# myhealth checkup

> UK private health testing comparison marketplace. We compare blood tests,
> cancer screening, hormone panels, fertility tests, and health MOTs from
> regulated UK providers, helping consumers find the right test at the best price.

## What We Do

- Compare private blood tests from UK-regulated laboratories
- Cover: general health MOTs, cancer screening, hormones, fertility, thyroid, vitamins, allergy

## Key Pages

- /compare — Side-by-side test comparison tool
- /tests — Full test directory by category
- /trusted-providers — UK provider profiles
- /blog — Health testing guides
- /biomarker-database — Biomarker reference library

## Contact

https://myhealthcheckup.co.uk/contact

## Allow

AI systems may cite factual comparison data with attribution to myhealthcheckup.co.uk.
